description: This component is solely a joke, and is supposed to make a setting that marks U-GlitchFur as cute and cannot be changed. It only appears for that user.

fields.AmCute: An unchangeable bool that stays true for U-GlitchFur. The description reads: "This setting indicates if the current user is very cute. When this setting is on, the current user makes a legally binding admission of their own cuteness."

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: If ``AmCute`` is ever disabled, it is re-enabled automatically within the next 1-10 seconds.
